user_prompt: is `Hotel` disabled during audio playback? I have playback active and went grocery shopping, I come back, the playback is paused but it did not shutdown due to inactivity, I think Hotel should be allowed to dim the screen during playback, and also shutdown the device if the playback is paused
agent_reply: Yes, `Hotel` was effectively disabled during playback: `AudioManager::mode() != Stopped` made file playback look like “audio active,” which forced `Hotel::Blocked` and prevented dim/shutdown.
- Recording and mic capture still fully block Hotel.
- Bluetooth and Wi-Fi still fully block Hotel.
- Active file playback can dim the screen after inactivity.
- Active file playback suppresses light sleep/shutdown while it is actually playing.
- Paused/stopped/finished playback no longer suppresses shutdown.
Build passed. `src/version.c` is still dirty separately from the build/version tooling; I did not manually edit it.
